name: The Close-Ready SEO Proposal
tagline: Written the way SEO work actually gets sold — not a generic proposal with keywords swapped in.
differentiator: Findings before the pitch — proves you understand the client's problem before you've priced anything. Most templates skip straight to the sales pitch.
description: A client-ready SEO proposal structured the way these deals actually close: audit findings first, then a scoped plan, then a price the client can say yes to without a follow-up call.
whatsInside: Findings & Opportunity table — Technical, Content, Schema, Authority
3-tier pricing table with a guided "most popular" option
whoFor: SEO freelancers, technical SEO consultants, and small agencies tired of proposals that read like every other "digital marketing" template.
